name: Shamrock Chocolate Cream Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth.
3. Add sugar, vanilla extract, and peppermint extract (if using) to the bowl; continue beating until well combined.
4. Mix in cocoa powder; beat until thoroughly blended.
5. Stir in eggs; beat until incorporated.
6. Gently fold in whipping cream.
7. Spoon the mixture into the prepared crust.
8. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the center is set when cooled.
9. Allow to cool to room temperature before serving.
10. Refrigerate any leftovers.
NUTRITIONAL INFORMATION PER SERVING (1/8 RECIPE)
400 Calories
6 gm Protein
35 gm Carbohydrate
26 gm Fat 14 gm Saturated Fat
110 mg Cholesterol
250 mg Sodium
55 mg Calcium
